zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Harrington於大約1422年出生在英國藍卡爾李時，他的父親Richard Harrington22歲，母親Elizabeth de Bradshagh18歲。他於大約1445年與Elizabeth Pilkington在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年8月12日在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Harrington于大约1422年出生在英国藍卡爾李时，他的父亲Richard Harrington22岁，母亲Elizabeth de Bradshagh18岁。他于大约1445年与Elizabeth Pilkington在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年8月12日在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herington
meanings: English: variant of   Harrington   or   Herrington  .

variants.name: Herrington
meanings: habitational name from Heronden in Tenterden (Kent) or Herrington in Houghton (Durham). The Kent placename may derive from an Old English personal name Hȳra + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘pasture’, while the Durham placename may come from Old English hæring ‘rocky place’ (from hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + the placename forming suffix -ing) or hæren ‘rocky’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Arrington
meanings: variant of Harrington with loss of initial H-.
possibly a habitational name from Arrington, a place in Cambridgeshire, named from an Old English byname, Earn(a), meaning ‘eagle’ + -inga- ‘people or followers of’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Harrington was born about 1422, in Leigh, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard Harrington, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth de Bradshagh, was 18. He married Elizabeth Pilkington about 1445, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 August 1488, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Harrington est né environ 1422, à Leigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Harrington, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Bradshagh, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Pilkington environ 1445, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 août 1488, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Harrington um 1422 in Leigh, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Harrington 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Bradshagh 18. Er hat um 1445 in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Pilkington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. August 1488 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Harrington è nato il circa 1422 nel Leigh, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard Harrington, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Bradshagh, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Pilkington circa 1445, nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 agosto 1488, nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Harringtonが約1422年にイギリスランカシュアイアレイグで生まれた時，父Richard Harringtonは22歳，母Elizabeth de Bradshaghは18歳であった。約1445年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスでElizabeth Pilkingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1488年8月12日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Harrington(이)가 대략 1422년 영국 랭카실르 리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Harrington(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Bradshagh(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 Elizabeth Pilkington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 8월 12일 영국 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Harrington nasceu aproximadamente 1422, em Leigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Harrington, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Bradshagh, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pilkington aproximadamente 1445, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1488, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Harrington родился около 1422 г. в местности лиг, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Harrington было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Bradshagh, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pilkington около 1445 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 августа 1488 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Harrington nació aproximadamente 1422, en Leigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Harrington, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Bradshagh, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Pilkington aproximadamente 1445, en Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1488, en Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
